metadata.title: We Found The Most Instagrammable Cafes In Bangalore And They Are Gorgeous | LBB
metadata.description: OK, we’ll admit it. Bangalore is beautiful. It’s a place you can easily Instagram, and get plenty of likes on too. But since the world is upping their Insta-game, we thought you shouldn’t be left behind either. So from art decor cafes with high ceilings to one that is straight out of Alice In Wonderland, check out these cafes for that perfect Instagram shot.
metadata.creator: LBB Bangalore

metadata.title: MOUNTAIN TREKKER
metadata.description:
I'm Varun, and I'm currently a full-time traveler pursuing my dreams. I love solo traveling & meeting people. After traveling extensively in Incredible India for years, I stepped out of my country and realized how beautiful the world is! I started making travel series in Hindi with full of travel tips and tricks, especially for budget travel. My dream is to inspire people to explore this beautiful world and learn the best things to make our world a better place to live in. I'm honored to have received the prestigious 'National Tourism Award' from the Government of India for my contributions to promoting tourism. Thanks to my viewers, they are the reason I get invitations from across the globe to visit new places.

FOLLOW ME ON
# INSTAGRAM - https://www.instagram.com/varunvagish
# FACEBOOK - https://www.facebook.com/varun.vagish 
# TWITTER - https://twitter.com/varunvagish 

Business Queries - business@touristhelpline.com
metadata.creator: Mountain Trekker (Manish Solanki)
